extension.summary: Browser tipo Stremio per TMDB + Torrentio (Real-Debrid).
extension.description: Browse TMDB catalogues, fetch streams from Torrentio resolved through Real-Debrid, and play them with the native Kodi player. Designed for Android TV and remote-only navigation.
Sfoglia il catalogo TMDB, recupera le sorgenti tramite Torrentio risolte da Real-Debrid e riproduce con il player nativo di Kodi. Pensato per Android TV e navigazione solo telecomando.
extension.news: v1.2.0 - Refactor: pluggable PROVIDERS list, parse_streams as a tested pure function, room for future fallbacks. v1.1.0 - Reliability + i18n pass: HTTP retries x2, lighter TMDB calls, fixed MIME hint. v1.0.3 - Embed default TMDB key. v1.0.0 - Initial release.
